hero.title: Sunita Thapa
hero.subtitle: Crafting beautiful, intuitive digital experiences that users love.

about.headline: Designing with purpose, empathy, and precision.
about.bio: I am a UI/UX designer passionate about crafting digital experiences that are not only visually stunning but deeply intuitive. With a background in user research and visual design, I help brands and startups translate complex problems into elegant, human-centered solutions. Every pixel I place is intentional — every interaction, considered.
about.philosophy: Great design is invisible. It anticipates needs, removes friction, and creates moments of delight. I believe in designing systems, not just screens — building cohesive experiences that scale beautifully across every touchpoint.

services.title: UI/UX Design
services.description: End-to-end interface design combining user research with stunning visuals. I create cohesive experiences that are both beautiful and intuitively usable across every touchpoint.

services.title: Mobile App Design
services.description: Native and cross-platform app designs that delight users on iOS and Android. From gesture-based navigation to micro-interactions, every detail is crafted for mobile-first experiences.

services.title: Web Design
services.description: Responsive websites and web applications that balance storytelling with functionality. Clean layouts, thoughtful typography, and seamless interactions across all screen sizes.

services.title: Design Systems
services.description: Scalable component libraries, design tokens, and comprehensive documentation that ensure brand consistency while accelerating product development across teams.

services.title: Brand Identity
services.description: Complete visual identity systems including logos, color palettes, typography, and brand guidelines that communicate your unique story across every medium.

services.title: Prototyping & Testing
services.description: Interactive prototypes for rapid validation and usability testing. I iterate quickly — testing assumptions and refining designs based on real user feedback and data.

projects.title: Bloom Finance
projects.description: A personal finance app designed for Gen Z users. End-to-end UX research, wireframing, and a vibrant visual system making money management approachable and enjoyable.

projects.title: MediFlow
projects.description: Comprehensive hospital management dashboard streamlining patient records, appointment scheduling, and analytics for healthcare professionals across clinics.

projects.title: Terra E-Commerce
projects.description: A sustainable goods marketplace with storytelling-driven design. Built a scalable design system and immersive browsing experience that elevated conversion by 34%.

projects.title: Voxel Social
projects.description: Creative networking platform connecting visual artists with collaborators. Designed UX flow from onboarding to content discovery with community-building features.

projects.title: Pulse Analytics
projects.description: Real-time analytics dashboard for marketing teams. Simplified complex datasets into intuitive visualizations and actionable insights through thoughtful IA.

projects.title: Nomad Travel
projects.description: Travel planning platform focused on immersive storytelling. Responsive web experiences with rich media integration and personalized trip curation flows.

process.title: Research & Discovery
process.description: I immerse myself in the problem space — conducting user interviews, stakeholder workshops, market analysis, and competitive audits to understand the full landscape and uncover real user needs.

process.title: Synthesize & Define
process.description: Insights are distilled into personas, journey maps, problem statements, and design requirements. This phase aligns user goals with business objectives and sets a clear strategic direction.

process.title: Ideate & Design
process.description: From sketches to wireframes to high-fidelity interactive prototypes, I iterate rapidly — exploring multiple solutions, testing assumptions, and refining based on real user feedback.

process.title: Test & Validate
process.description: Usability testing sessions, A/B testing, and heuristic evaluations ensure designs are intuitive and effective. I gather actionable feedback to polish every interaction before handoff.

process.title: Deliver & Evolve
process.description: Final designs are handed off with comprehensive documentation, design system assets, and developer specs. Post-launch, I track metrics and iterate based on real-world usage data.

testimonials.quote: Sunita redesigned our entire product dashboard and the results were staggering. User engagement jumped 40% and our support tickets dropped by half. She has a rare gift for making complex data feel simple.
testimonials.name: Marcus Chen

testimonials.quote: Working with Sunita was a transformative experience for our brand. She didn't just design a beautiful app — she built a design system that our team still uses daily. Truly world-class.
testimonials.name: Aisha Patel

testimonials.quote: Sunita's user research methodology is second to none. She uncovered insights about our customers that we had missed for years. Her usability audit saved us months of development time.
testimonials.name: James Mitchell

testimonials.quote: The travel platform Sunita designed captured exactly the feeling we wanted — adventurous yet trustworthy. Every interaction feels considered. Our users constantly compliment the experience.
testimonials.name: Elena Rossi

contact.cta: Have a project in mind? Let's create something remarkable together.
